name: Selligent Marketing Cloud API
what_it_does: B2C marketing automation and customer data platform with REST API — enabling enterprise marketers to manage customer data, segment audiences, and orchestrate personalized omnichannel campaigns across email, mobile, web, and social, with AI-driven recommendations, real-time customer profiles, and journey automation for high-volume B2C enterprises.
use_cases: Triggering personalized email campaigns via Selligent API for real-time customer event response
Syncing customer data via Selligent API for CDP enrichment and unified customer profile
Managing contact lists and segments via Selligent REST API for audience management automation
Sending transactional messages via Selligent API for order confirmation and lifecycle automation
Tracking campaign performance via Selligent API for marketing analytics integration
not_for: B2B marketing automation (Selligent is B2C-focused consumer marketing)
Small businesses without enterprise marketing team (Selligent is enterprise-only pricing)
Simple email-only campaigns (use Mailchimp or Klaviyo for simpler use cases)
best_when: A large B2C brand (retail, travel, financial services) needs enterprise marketing automation with unified customer data and omnichannel orchestration — where Selligent provides high-volume campaign management with AI personalization.
avoid_when: You're B2B, a small business, need simple email only, or are not an enterprise with a dedicated marketing operations team.

auth.notes: OAuth2 client credentials grant. Bearer token authentication. Client ID and secret from Selligent API configuration. Token endpoint per organization. No fine-grained OAuth scopes. Webhooks for campaign events. REST API v2 (SOAP API v1 legacy still supported). Enterprise onboarding required for API access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; enterprise subscription only
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise custom pricing; typically $50K-500K+/year based on contact volume
pricing.notes: Belgian company (Mechelen, Belgium). Founded 1999 as Campaign Commander. Renamed Selligent 2012. Acquired by Waterland Private Equity 2014. Strong European enterprise customer base. Customers: Delhaize, Thomas Cook, BNP Paribas, La Redoute, Seat (car brand). GDPR by design (Belgian/EU company). 700M+ contacts managed globally. B2C focus: retail, travel, financial services, publishing. AI: Cortex AI for behavioral prediction and next-best action. Journey Builder for lifecycle automation. Selligent AI (Cortex) includes churn prediction, NBO. US presence via acquisitions. Multi-tenancy for enterprise. Strong European market — less known in US.

performance.rate_limits: Enterprise agreement defines limits; not publicly documented

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API v2 with OAuth2. Legacy SOAP API v1. No fine-grained scopes. Webhooks. GDPR/CCPA/ISO27001. Belgian/EU company. Enterprise subscription only. Annual contract. B2C marketing focus. Limited public API documentation.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Contact reads idempotent by contact ID/email. Campaign reads idempotent. Message sends not idempotent — implement deduplication at application level. Journey triggers: verify state before triggering.
known_agent_gotchas: Legacy SOAP API (v1) still in use in older integrations — REST v2 is current; don't use SOAP for new code
Enterprise-only — no self-service; requires sales engagement and onboarding
Belgian company — strict EU/Belgian GDPR compliance; data processing agreements required
Cortex AI features require separate enablement — not all API endpoints available by default
OAuth2 token endpoint is organization-specific URL — get from Selligent onboarding
B2C consumer data at scale — GDPR consent management must be implemented by integrator

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR, CCPA, ISO27001. OAuth2 client credentials. Belgian company — strict EU data protection. EU/US data residency. Consumer PII (B2C marketing data) is GDPR-sensitive at scale. Enterprise contract includes data processing agreement. ISO27001 certified. Waterland PE-owned.
